name: Dr. Amina Okafor
title: Senior Research Fellow, Youth Employment
bio: Leading researcher on youth labor market dynamics in West Africa with over 15 years of experience advising governments on employment policy.

name: Prof. Kwame Mensah
title: Professor of Development Economics
bio: Published over 50 peer-reviewed papers on youth economic empowerment and financial inclusion in sub-Saharan Africa.

name: Dr. Fatima Ben Ali
title: Director, Youth Policy Unit
bio: Leads the AU's youth policy monitoring and African Youth Charter implementation tracking across member states.

name: Dr. Joseph Kamau
title: Health Systems Researcher
bio: Specialist in adolescent and youth health systems research, focusing on access to reproductive health services across East Africa.

name: Dr. Nadia El-Sayed
title: Education Policy Analyst
bio: Expert on technical and vocational education transformation for youth across North Africa and the Middle East.

name: Dr. Thabo Mokoena
title: Chief Data Scientist
bio: Pioneered the use of big data analytics for youth development indicators across Southern Africa.

name: Dr. Mariama Diallo
title: Gender and Youth Specialist
bio: Advocates for gender-responsive youth policies and leads programs supporting young women in science and technology.

name: Mr. Emmanuel Nsanzimana
title: Innovation Hub Director
bio: Leads one of East Africa's premier innovation hubs, supporting over 200 youth-led tech startups since 2012.

name: Dr. Aïssatou Bah
title: Agricultural Economist
bio: Researches youth engagement in agriculture and rural value chains across the Sahel region.

name: Dr. Daniel Mwangi
title: Civic Engagement Researcher
bio: Studies youth civic participation and its impact on democratic governance in East and Southern Africa.

name: Dr. Chinwe Eze
title: Climate and Youth Policy Advisor
bio: Advises on integrating youth perspectives into climate action and green economy transitions across Africa.

name: Mr. Moussa Traoré
title: Youth Programs Manager
bio: Manages youth exchange and skills development programs across the 15 ECOWAS member states.

name: Dr. Blessing Chiweshe
title: Sociologist, Youth Studies
bio: Publishes extensively on urban youth livelihoods, migration patterns, and social mobility in Southern Africa.

name: Dr. Hassan Ahmed
title: Public Health Epidemiologist
bio: Leads youth mental health surveillance and pandemic preparedness research at the Africa Centres for Disease Control.

name: Ms. Adama Jallow
title: Digital Skills Program Lead
bio: Designs digital skills training programs targeting underemployed youth in West Africa's fragile states.

name: Prof. Jean-Pierre Habimana
title: Professor of Political Science
bio: Expert on youth political participation in post-conflict societies in the Great Lakes region.

name: Dr. Laila Abdi
title: Migration and Youth Researcher
bio: Researches youth displacement, migration pathways, and resilience building in the Horn of Africa.

name: Mr. Patrick Okello
title: Financial Inclusion Analyst
bio: Analyzes youth financial inclusion trends and mobile money adoption patterns across sub-Saharan Africa.

name: Dr. Fatou Sow
title: Demographer
bio: Leading demographer studying the implications of Africa's youth bulge on economic development and social services.

name: Dr. Samuel Ofori
title: Education Economist
bio: Researches education financing models and returns to education for African youth, advising multiple governments.

name: Ms. Zawadi Kimaro
title: Youth Entrepreneurship Lead
bio: Has mentored over 500 young African entrepreneurs and manages a $100M youth enterprise development fund.

name: Dr. Abdelkader Bouazza
title: Labor Market Economist
bio: ILO specialist studying informal employment and youth unemployment in North Africa and the Maghreb region.

name: Dr. Grace Mwende
title: Nutritionist and Youth Health Advocate
bio: Designs youth nutrition programs and advocates for adolescent health integration into national health strategies.

name: Mr. Ibrahim Touré
title: TVET Policy Specialist
bio: Works on harmonizing TVET frameworks and apprenticeship standards across the African continent.

name: Dr. Nosipho Dlamini
title: Social Protection Researcher
bio: Evaluates social protection programs targeting vulnerable youth across SADC member states.

name: Prof. Mourad Benhassen
title: ICT and Innovation Researcher
bio: Studies the role of technology hubs and ICT policy in fostering youth innovation ecosystems in North Africa.

name: Dr. Chantal Uwineza
title: Gender and Education Specialist
bio: Champions girls' education and gender parity in STEM fields across East and Central Africa.

name: Mr. Oluwaseun Adebayo
title: Data Analytics Lead
bio: Leads data-driven advocacy for youth digital rights and internet freedom across West Africa.
